title: Shipwright Run Config (schemaVersion 2)
description: Authoritative shape of shipwright_run_config.json for the shipwright-run pipeline orchestrator. single_session is the SOLE execution mode: the master drives every phase via a phase-runner subagent in ONE conversation. Vertragsschicht for the shipwright-webui repo (schema v3 of sdk-sessions.json mirrors phase_tasks[]).

schemaVersion.description: Hard cut: orchestrator phase-lifecycle subcommands reject anything other than 2.

runId.description: Stable run identifier. 'run-' + first 8 hex chars of a uuid4.

mode.description: Pipeline execution mode. 'single_session' is the SOLE mode: the /shipwright-run master drives every phase via a phase-runner subagent in ONE conversation, so the pipeline advances on every surface. The former 'multi_session' mode (each phase its own external bound Claude session, claimed/completed by SessionStart+Stop hooks) was REMOVED together with its engine in iterate-2026-07-14-remove-multi-session. DRIVABILITY IS AN EXPLICIT LITERAL: a run is a driven pipeline iff it records 'single_session'. NOTE the deliberate ABSENCE of a JSON-Schema `default`: absence is MEANINGFUL here (it means 'not a drivable run'), so there is no assume-when-absent value a consumer may fill in — a `default` would let a schema-default consumer (ajv useDefaults) silently reinterpret a mode-less pre-SS1 config as a drivable one, which is exactly what the explicit-literal rule forbids. The field stays OPTIONAL (not in 'required') purely for READ-compatibility: a mode-less config, and one still carrying 'multi_session', LOADS fine (so historical runs stay inspectable) but is refused by every execution entry point with an actionable migration message (set mode: single_session + resume; phase_tasks[] are shared and re-claim is idempotent, so no phase work is lost).

securityEnabled.description: Frozen at run creation from AIKIDO_CLIENT_ID env. Mid-run env changes do not affect this.

splitMode.description: Frozen at design-stop. null until then.

splits_frozen.description: Frozen at design-stop. Empty list means single-pass build (splitMode=none) or design has not yet completed.

phase_history.description: Iterate 12.0 (ADR-027) per-phase audit trail. Unchanged from v1.

iterate_history.description: Legacy field; new entries live under .shipwright/agent_docs/iterates/.

sessionUuid.description: Pre-bound at planning time. The phase task's CAS CLAIM TOKEN — the single-session loop claims the task with it (claim_phase_task). NOT a Claude session id: under the removed multi_session mode it doubled as the id a phase session was launched with, but the phase runner is now a subagent of the master and has no bound session of its own.

version.description: Bumped by recover-phase-task. Used in CAS by complete-phase-task and mark-phase-failed.

launchCommandHint.description: Display-only hint. Authoritative launch command may differ (WebUI generates its own).

claimedBySessionUuid.description: Set by claim-phase-task. Cleared by recover-phase-task.

result.description: Populated on terminal status. Includes ok flag and artifacts list.

allOf.description: Plan-state and build-state phase tasks may have splitId; everyone else must have null.
